name: mail-agent
comment_voice_deps: Voice surface (voice-bot.mjs): @discordjs/voice needs an Opus encoder -- opusscript (pure-JS, no native build; fine for one stream), used both to encode TTS playback and (via prism-media's opus.Decoder, declared directly since voice-bot.mjs imports prism-media rather than relying on the @discordjs/voice transitive) to DECODE received audio for STT -- and encryption, covered by node's built-in aes-256-gcm (a Discord voice mode; verified via generateDependencyReport, so no sodium lib needed). @snazzah/davey (DAVE E2EE) ships a per-platform NATIVE binding as an optionalDependency of davey itself; the npm optional-deps bug (npm/cli#4828) can skip it, so BOTH glibc bindings are pinned here as direct optionalDependencies -- npm installs whichever matches the build arch and skips the other (EBADPLATFORM is non-fatal for optional deps), keeping cross-arch builds working like codapi/invisible; the Dockerfile's `require('@snazzah/davey')` check still fails the build loudly if the matching binding is missing. Piper (TTS) is a binary fetched + arch-selected in the Dockerfile, not an npm dep.
